mapper.insert: insert into dish (name, category_id, price, image, description, tag_type, luxury_level, recommend_weight, like_count, favorite_count, note_count, comment_count, score, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, ifnull(#{tagType}, 'DINING'), ifnull(#{luxuryLevel}, 1), ifnull(#{recommendWeight}, 0), ifnull(#{likeCount}, 0), ifnull(#{favoriteCount}, 0), ifnull(#{noteCount}, 0), ifnull(#{commentCount}, 0), ifnull(#{score}, 5.00), #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
UPDATE dish
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
tag_type = #{tagType},
luxury_level = #{luxuryLevel},
recommend_weight = #{recommendWeight},
like_count = #{likeCount},
favorite_count = #{favoriteCount},
note_count = #{noteCount},
comment_count = #{commentCount},
score = #{score},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
WHERE id = #{id}
